goal: Reduce one tracked NodeMCPHost held risk by moving notifications/list_changed evidence from unit-only coverage into host interop live evidence.
successCriteria: NodeMCPHost remains beta (held) but its held basis shrinks from three deferred risks to two.
Host interop live evidence records notifications/list_changed without adding new public MCP runtime surface.
Tracked decision and report rendering reflect the narrower held basis.
